item.title: TVS Srichakra Joins MomentumNow Stocks on Strong Financial Upswing
item.description: TVS Srichakra, a small-cap player in the Tyres & Rubber Products sector, has been added to the MomentumNow Stocks list as of 13 April 2026, reflecting its impressive recent financial performance and technical momentum. This inclusion highlights the company’s robust earnings growth and operational efficiency, positioning it as a compelling candidate for investors seeking momentum-driven opportunities in the current market cycle. Time: Apr 13 2026 08:30 PM IST

item.title: Mawana Sugars Added to Hidden Turnarounds List on Strong Financial Recovery
item.description: Mawana Sugars has been newly added to the Hidden Turnarounds list as of 13 April 2026, reflecting a significant shift in its financial trajectory and market sentiment. The micro-cap sugar company’s recent quarterly results and improved financial metrics have positioned it as a compelling candidate for investors seeking early-stage turnaround opportunities within the sugar sector. Time: Apr 13 2026 08:30 PM IST

item.title: Ind Bank Housing Q4 FY26: Micro-Cap Housing Financier Struggles with Persistent Losses
item.description: Ind Bank Housing Ltd., the micro-cap housing finance company promoted jointly by Indian Bank and HUDCO, reported another quarter of losses in Q4 FY26, posting a net loss of ₹0.02 crores for the quarter ended March 2026. The company, with a market capitalisation of just ₹46.00 crores, continues to grapple with operational challenges despite a recent surge in stock price, which jumped 5.25% to ₹46.50 following the results announcement. Time: Apr 13 2026 08:01 PM IST

item.title: 109% Return in One Year, 103% Profit Growth: What Drives AXISCADES Technologies Ltd’s Multibagger Rally?
item.description: A 109.13% stock return in one year. A 103.1% growth in net profit over the same period. The gap between those two numbers is relatively narrow, indicating that earnings growth has been a significant driver of AXISCADES Technologies Ltd's rally. Yet, the stock trades at a P/E multiple nearly three times the industry average, raising questions about valuation sustainability. Time: Apr 13 2026 06:35 PM IST

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Datiware Maritime Infra Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 24.96
item.description: Surging to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 24.96 on 13 Apr 2026, Datiware Maritime Infra Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, outperforming its sector and the broader market despite a challenging environment. This milestone caps a 54.65% rally over the past year, significantly outpacing the Sensex’s modest 2.25% gain. Time: Apr 13 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: Paisalo Digital Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Paisalo Digital Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 13 Jun 2026. Yet, the stock slipped 0.66% on the day, and while weekly and monthly technical indicators lean bullish, the mixed signals warrant a closer look at the reliability of this crossover. Time: Apr 13 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Ltd. Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Ltd. has crossed above the 200-day moving average, creating a golden cross on 13 Apr 2026. While this technical event often signals a shift towards bullish momentum, the broader technical and fundamental context presents a more nuanced picture that warrants careful analysis. Time: Apr 13 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: Kemp & Co Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 868.3 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline has pushed Kemp & Co Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 868.3 on 13 Apr 2026, marking a significant 44.4% drop from its 52-week high of Rs 1,559.95. This latest fall comes amid a broader market downturn but stands out due to the stock’s persistent underperformance and fundamental weaknesses. Time: Apr 13 2026 06:00 PM IST
